decisions.decision: Render AnalyticsFilters in isolation with direct props and vi.fn() callbacks, using renderWithProviders for Router context
alternatives_rejected: Integration-style through Analytics page route (would duplicate Analytics.test.tsx coverage and require API mocking)
Plain render() without providers (would crash due to Link requiring Router context)

decisions.decision: Test the Open Market link href and conditional market metadata rendering in addition to dropdown/interval callbacks
alternatives_rejected: Only test dropdown and interval (would miss the two major conditional rendering branches)

decisions.decision: Use toHaveStyle with CSS variable values (var(--color-primary), var(--color-border)) for active/inactive interval button assertions
alternatives_rejected: Class-based assertions (component uses inline styles, not classes)
Snapshot testing (brittle and doesn't communicate intent)

decisions.decision: Create a makeMarket() helper function following the makeSummary() pattern from AnalyticsSummaryCards.test.tsx for test data
alternatives_rejected: Inline market objects in each test (verbose and harder to maintain)

decisions.decision: Assert presence of metadata spans (Liquidity, Volume, Expires) without checking exact formatted values, since formatCurrency and timeUntil are tested elsewhere
alternatives_rejected: Assert exact formatted output (couples test to utility implementation details)

steps.task: Create frontend/src/__tests__/AnalyticsFilters.test.tsx with imports (vitest, testing-library, renderWithProviders, AnalyticsFilters, types) and a makeMarket() helper that returns a MarketSummary with sensible defaults and accepts Partial overrides

Add test: 'renders fallback text when no market is selected' — render with markets array, selectedMarketId, interval, but no selectedMarket. Assert 'Choose a market' is shown, no 'Open Market' link, no metadata spans

Add test: 'renders market details when selectedMarket is provided' — render with a selectedMarket. Assert title, StatusBadge presence, Liquidity/Volume/Expires metadata spans, and 'Open Market' link with correct href (/markets/{id})
Add test: 'renders market options in dropdown' — render with a markets array of 2+ items. Assert each market title appears as an option in the select element
Add test: 'calls onMarketChange when dropdown selection changes' — render with vi.fn() for onMarketChange, fire change event on the select, assert callback called with the new market ID value

Add test: 'calls onIntervalChange when interval button is clicked' — render with vi.fn() for onIntervalChange, click the inactive interval button, assert callback called with the correct interval value

Add test: 'highlights active interval button' — render with interval='day', assert Day button has borderColor var(--color-primary) and Hour button has borderColor var(--color-border). Repeat with interval='hour' to verify the inverse
Run the test suite (npx vitest run AnalyticsFilters) to verify all tests pass, fix any failures
